panels.title: About This Tab
panels.content: 📖 Reference walkthrough for a first playthrough. No completion tracking — use the other tabs for that.

panels.title: Main Story Path
rows: 🛒 Buy all Walnuts. Visit ! Tavern to learn the Rumor system.
📜 Check Tavern rumors. Visit ! Trading House to learn about Contracts.
📦 Buy 4 Carp for the tutorial contract (you cannot decline).
✅ Deliver Carp to complete contract. Visit ! Market (sell Walnuts — must be 2 towns away from purchase). Visit ! Workshop (don't expand cart yet). Visit ! Trading House (take a loan if needed).

💬 Choose **I wasn't lovestruck!** for Holo event. Check rumors. Visit all ! locations. Talk to Barmaid → meet Eve → choose *You're right*. Visit ! Inn → find informant who wants 3,000 silver. Take a loan if needed. Visit ! Vacant House → pay 3,000 silver to unlock Beorein.
🌊 Visit ! Port (meet Luka). Buy as many Mussels as you can afford. At ! Gate, acquire rumor for Erne.
📜 At Erne Tavern: get Delintskolz rumor. At Delintskolz: unlock Lune automatically.
💰 Visit ! Inn. Sell all Mussels for a big payday. Repay loan. Buy Eggs and Straps. Fill cart.
🛒 Sell everything. Buy Mussels and Oysters. Visit ! Port to recruit Luka. Visit ! Private House → choose *That's right* for Luka.
📜 Visit ! Inn — next goal: see Dian Reubens in Ulrich. Luka leaves. Sell everything. Handle loan. If 2,500+ silver: buy 4 Straps here + 2 Peppers in Delintskolz. Otherwise buy Eggs and Straps.
👥 Choose your optional companion (Norah, Eve, or Luka). Holo is always with you.
🏙️ Sell anything selling high at Erne. Sell everything in Ulrich. The game opens up here — trade freely.
⚗️ Complete the 3 Alchemy Tool quests (Pot / Distiller / Furnace) in any order. Each costs ~3,000 silver + 1,000 for the tip rumor. See Alchemy Quest Tasks below.
🏁 Visit ! Inn in Lune (deliver medicine). When ready, go to ! Port in Beorein. ⚠️ **POINT OF NO RETURN.** Enter ! Cave. Choose your ending.

panels.title: Alchemy Quest Tasks
rows: Tip rumor: Graha Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Alchemy Pot in Lamtra (~3,000 silver). Deliver to Dian in Ulrich.
Tip rumor: Leyage Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Distiller in Lenos (~3,000 silver). Deliver to Dian in Ulrich.
Tip rumor: Lune Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Furnace in Gahno (~3,000 silver). Deliver to Dian in Ulrich.
Tip rumor: Delintskolz Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Opium in Bourattia (~5,000 silver). Deliver to Dian.
Tip rumor: Erne Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Myrrh in Diemoln (~5,000 silver). Deliver to Dian.
Tip rumor: Ruckiholk Tavern (1,000 silver). Buy Powdered Lily in Rossalt (~5,000 silver). Deliver to Dian.

panels.title: Goods Knowledge Goals (for A+ runs)
rows: Green Peas in Leyage, Mushrooms in Poroson
Eggs in Lune, Milk in Erne
Soda Water in Diemoln is a fast grind
Cookies in Lenos, Jerky in Erne
Cloves in Ulrich, Pepper in Delintskolz
